title: /cln
text: /cln Clean up components by deleting orphan definitions in the component. /cln { Component } Use With ide —Uniface IDE Description Clean up the named component. If you omit Component , all components are cleaned up. You can use wildcard characters to specify a group of components. Example: /cln The following example cleans up all components: /cln * Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
